name: Reinet Investments S.C.A.
governance_note: Investment entity under IFRS 10; key metric is NAV, not revenue/EBITDA. Managed by Reinet Investments Manager S.A. (General Partner) with Reinet Investment Advisors Limited as Investment Advisor. Linked to the Rupert family / Richemont restructuring of 2008. Largest single asset is unlisted Pension Insurance Corporation Group (~53.7% of NAV at 31 Mar 2025).

Reinet_Annual_Report_FY2025_extracted-te.text_source: web_fetch -> text (binary PDF download blocked by sandbox proxy)
Reinet_Annual_Report_FY2025_extracted-te._provenance: Reinet Investments S.C.A. Annual Report at 31 March 2025 (year ended 31 Mar 2025). Text extracted via web_fetch on 2026-06-08; original PDF binary could not be saved (proxy blocked). Re-download from reinet.com or JSE SENS if binary required.

Reinet_RNI_FY2025_Analysis_Jun2026.docx._provenance: Internal analyst note (Cowork), 8 June 2026 - FY2025 results analysis: NAV, BAT exit, Pension Corporation concentration, risk flags.
